title: We Don't Bite
description:
🦊 Villagers Vs 🐻‍❄️ Illagers
/ Changes mob models using CEM mods
body:
![Project Banner](https://i.imgur.com/uhNL9cO.png)

![Dependencies](https://i.imgur.com/QDgzID6.png)

# We Don't Bite


This resource pack changes the appearance of villagers into foxes, illagers into polar bears, using custom entity model mods!



### Fox villagers 🦊
* Become furry and smaller
* Make squeaky fox sounds
* Animated ears and tails
* Red, arctic, and fennec fox variants
* Profession clothings and levels
* Wandering trader fennec fox
* Zombie fox villagers

### Polar bear illagers 🐻‍❄️
* Become furry, white, and bigger
* Make scary roars
* Pillager, vindicator, evoker, ravager, witch, ravager, and illusioner

### Minor changes 
* Raid omen effect appearance
* Totem of undying appearance

### Does not change 😢:
* Actual mob size (hitbox)



## Dependencies:

### One of custom entity model mods

#### Get one that can be used in your version

* [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) ((Neo)Forge/Fabric 1.17.2 - **26.1+**)

* [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (Forge/Vanilla 1.12.2 - 1.21.4+)

* [CEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) (Forge/Fabric 1.18.2 - 1.20)



![Project Banner](https://i.imgur.com/lpO3Taz.png)



## Compatibilities:
* Most shaders
* Sounds from other resource packs
  


## Incompatibilities:
#### Villager/illager mods that doesn't use vanilla villagers are not supported:
* NPC Variety mod
* some more
#### Does not utilize fox/bear textures from other resource packs



## Version Differences
### 1.12.2
- No biome foxes
- No polar bears for you too
### before 26.1
- No/weird sleeping animation
- No spawn egg textures
- Unchanged armor/items positions
- Bugs



## Addons
Get them from [my discord server](https://discord.gg/RaPrs543gx)
* Polar Bear Ominous Banner Resource Pack
* Guard Villager Mod (1.19.0, Forge 41.0.1)



## Download Links

**EMF**: https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

**OptiFine**: https://optifine.net/downloads

**CEM**: https://modrinth.com/mod/cem

Also available for Bedrock Edition: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/wedontbite-be
